apply: Design a simple computerized accounting system for a small business.
Implement a computerized accounting system using accounting software.
Troubleshoot common problems in a computerized accounting system.
Evaluate the efficiency of a computerized accounting system.
analyze: Analyze the advantages and disadvantages of a manual accounting system versus a computerized accounting system.
Compare the costs of implementing a computerized accounting system versus a manual accounting system.
Analyze the impact of a computerized accounting system on business decision-making.
Evaluate the effectiveness of a computerized accounting system in reducing errors.
remember: Recall the different types of computerized accounting systems.
Explain the characteristics of a computerized accounting system.
Describe the components of a computerized accounting system.
Identify the advantages and disadvantages of a computerized accounting system.
understand: Explain how a computerized accounting system works.
Describe the different types of computer hardware used in a computerized accounting system.
Explain the role of computer software in a computerized accounting system.
Describe the security measures used in a computerized accounting system.

ncert_objectives: To understand the need for a computerized accounting system.
To explain the characteristics of a computerized accounting system.
To describe the components of a computerized accounting system.
To explain the advantages and disadvantages of a computerized accounting system.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the types of computerized accounting systems and their characteristics.
Students will be able to describe the components of a computerized accounting system and their functions.
Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of a computerized accounting system.
Students will be able to apply the knowledge of computerized accounting systems to real-life scenarios.
